params.query: (((text:statistics OR text:statistics OR text__reviews:statistics)(text:long OR text:long OR text__reviews:long)(text:memory OR text:memory OR text__reviews:memory)(text:processes OR text:processes OR text__reviews:processes)(text:beran OR text:beran OR text__reviews:beran)) OR (text:"statistics for long memory processes beran" OR text:"statistics for long memory processes beran" OR text__reviews:"statistics for long memory processes beran")) AND mediatype:texts
